home.title: Building a Brighter Green Future Together
home.highlights2: FinTech Awards 2021 Panel Discussion – Powered by Cyberport
home.highlights3: Topic: The New Era of Wealth Management
home.p1: As a global financial centre with a growing strategic interest in sustainable finance, and a financial hub which recognised as a leader in digital technologies and innovation, Hong Kong is seeking an improved understanding of how digital finance can accelerate the greening of financial flows.
home.p2: This implies the integration of environmental risks and opportunities into day-to-day financing and investment decisions, as well as the research and development of the financial services and products that make a substantial contribution to environmental objectives. It also involves the practice of policy approaches that harness green digital finance applications to realign financial flows towards low-carbon and resource-efficient economies.
home.p3: The “FinTech Awards 2021”, organised by ET Net held for five consecutive years. The aim is to commending the good use of FinTech practices and recognising outstanding from Hong Kong-based companies. Our efforts in achieving excellent business performance and sustainable growth have earned widespread recognition in the market. This award is an acknowledgment of the commitment from the industries to maintain outstanding practices in all aspects of FinTech.
home.p4: [Appreciation Certificate on Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG)]
home.p5: With the rise of companies support, focus, and involve in developing a green economy nowadays by paying great efforts and contributing to Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG), aiming to develop and maintain sustainable development in the environment not only for the society, but also the global community. Therefore, the Award this year would also highlight and credit corporate, business, contributors with an Appreciation Certificate on Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG)’.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.p1: The FinTech Awards 2021 provide our knowledge partner / sponsors with unique brand building opportunities among a wide network of leading businesses and individuals from across the financial technology sector.
sponsors.p2: As a knowledge partner / sponsor, your company will be associated with excellence and innovation, boosting its profile within the industry and positioning your brand as a thought leader in the space.
sponsors.p3: The knowledge partner / sponsor will present the trophy to winners. It is a great honour for the winners to receive the award from the prestigious industry leader.
sponsors.p4: To be our knowledge partner / sponsor of FinTech Awards 2021, our extensive marketing and public relations campaign assists us to generate interest in the Awards whilst promoting our knowledge partner / sponsors as the supportive industry players. The public and industry support of the Awards will provide various positive opportunities for knowledge partner / sponsors to be aligned with a wide range of commercial activities.
sponsors.exposure_title: Knowledge Partner / Sponsors will find significant opportunities for exposure within:
sponsors.list2_3: General public, through significant mass media exposure
